dashboard.title: Welcome back
dashboard.description: Manage your digital credentials and applications.

quickActions.title: Quick Actions
quickActions.applyDescription: Browse available credentials and start an application

credentials.title: My Credentials
credentials.description: Your issued digital credentials and their status.

empty.message: No credentials yet. Apply for a credential to get started.

applications.title: My Applications
applications.description: Track the status of your credential applications.

devices.title: Device Management
devices.description: Manage your registered devices for secure credential access.
devices.info: Registered devices can receive push notifications and securely sign verification challenges. Remove devices you no longer use to maintain security.

security.hasPublicKey: Device has registered a public key for challenge signing

empty.title: No Devices Registered
empty.description: Register your mobile wallet app to receive push notifications and use secure verification features.

unregisterDialog.title: Unregister Device?
unregisterDialog.message: Are you sure you want to unregister this device? This will prevent it from receiving push notifications and using secure verification features.

profile.title: Profile
profile.emailHelp: Contact support to change your email

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.applicationUpdatesDescription: Get notified when your application status changes

catalog.title: Credential Catalog
catalog.description: Browse and apply for available credentials
catalog.descriptionWithOrg: Browse and apply for available credentials from {{organizationName}}

empty.title: No Credentials Available
empty.description: There are no credentials available for your organization at this time.
empty.message: No credentials match your search criteria. Try adjusting your filters.

applicationForm.description: Complete the form below to apply for your credential.

instructions.default: Please fill in all required fields.

review.title: Review Your Application
review.description: Please review your information before submitting.
review.terms: I certify that all information provided is accurate and complete. I understand that providing false information may result in denial of my application.

success.title: Application Submitted!
success.message: Your application has been submitted successfully.
success.nextSteps: You will receive updates on your application status via email. Redirecting to your applications page...
success.previewMessage: In production, this application would be submitted for review.
success.previewNote: The applicant would receive confirmation and be able to track the application status.

errors.noCredential: Please select a credential from the catalog before starting an application.

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
validation.invalidPhone: Please enter a valid phone number
validation.fillRequiredFields: Please fill in all required fields
